title: Project Commander Manifest
description: Schema for projectcommander.json manifest files that define commands and startup forms for Aspire Project Commander.

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON schema for validation and IntelliSense.

version.description: The version of the manifest schema. Currently only '1.0' is supported.

startupForm.description: Optional startup form that must be completed before the project starts its main work.

commands.description: Commands that should be added to the Aspire dashboard for this project.

inputType.description: The type of input control to display.

input.description: Defines an input field for a command or startup form.

name.description: The unique name of the input field. Used as the key in the returned data dictionary.

label.description: The label displayed to the user. Defaults to the name if not specified.

description.description: Optional description or help text for the input.

required.description: Whether this input must be filled out.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.

maxLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed for text inputs.

options.description: Available options for Choice input type.

allowCustomChoice.description: Whether custom values are allowed for Choice input type.

enableDescriptionMarkdown.description: Whether the description supports Markdown rendering.

startupForm.description: Defines a startup form that blocks project execution until filled out by the developer.

title.description: The title of the startup form dialog.

description.description: Optional description text displayed below the title.

inputs.description: The input fields for the startup form.

command.description: Defines a command that appears in the Aspire dashboard for this project.

name.description: The unique identifier for the command. Must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens.

displayName.description: The display name shown in the Aspire dashboard.

description.description: Optional description of what the command does.

iconName.description: The icon name to display. Uses Fluent UI icon names (e.g., 'Play', 'Stop', 'Settings').

confirmationMessage.description: Optional confirmation message to show before executing the command.

isHighlighted.description: Whether the command should be visually highlighted in the dashboard.

inputs.description: Optional input fields to prompt for when the command is executed.
